test_strategy_covers_all_types.notes: Unit (62 validation-rule tests + 12 structural), integration (13 cross-module), regression (90 existing). No E2E/security/performance needed -- prompt-verification project.

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.notes: 87 test cases covering 7 FRs, 30 ACs, 4 NFRs, 62 validation rules, 19 error codes

traceability_matrix_complete.notes: traceability-matrix.csv has 87 entries mapping all requirements to test cases. 100% AC coverage.

coverage_targets_defined.notes: 100% FR, AC, NFR, validation rule, and error code coverage targets. 0 regression target for existing 90 tests.

test_data_strategy_documented.notes: Test data is static .md file content read at test time. No fixtures/mocks needed. Documented in test-strategy.md Section 5.

critical_paths_identified.notes: 5 critical paths identified: Critic completeness, Refiner completeness, Orchestrator generalization, Creator awareness, Cross-module integrity.
